name: Affiliate Onboarding — FirstPromoter Code Issue + Attio Write-Back

nodes.name: Create FirstPromoter Promoter
nodes.notes: POST https://firstpromoter.com/api/v1/promoters/create. Auth via bound httpHeaderAuth credential setting header `x-api-key: <FIRSTPROMOTER_API_KEY>`. Response body contains the promoter's referral data — we read the default promotion's `promo_code` (or `default_ref_id` as fallback) for write-back to Attio.

nodes.name: Write Code to Attio Deal
nodes.notes: PATCH the deal record to write firstpromoter_code (the join key between Attio and FirstPromoter per attio-config-spec-v2.md). Auth header `Authorization: Bearer <ATTIO_API_KEY>` via bound credential.

notes: Triggered by an Attio webhook (or a forwarder from the Next.js app) when a PT/Influencer/Gym deal reaches the 'approved/activated' stage. Creates a promoter in FirstPromoter via /api/v1/promoters/create, then writes the returned promo_code back to the Attio deal's `firstpromoter_code` field — this is the join key between the two systems per attio-config-spec-v2.md. Env-free by design: no $env.* references; FirstPromoter and Attio auth come from bound n8n credentials (FirstPromoter API: httpHeaderAuth with header `x-api-key: <FIRSTPROMOTER_API_KEY>`; Attio API: httpHeaderAuth with header `Authorization: Bearer <ATTIO_API_KEY>`). Webhook accepts either { record: {...} } (Supabase shape) or flat body with email/first_name/last_name/attio_deal_id.
